transport: HTTP x402 — mirrors MCP tool get_trade_signal (single source of truth: same core handler)

error_contract.402: Payment-Required envelope { x402Version, error, resource{url,description,mimeType}, accepts[], extensions.bazaar }, NO live tool result

cache_contract: no cache — live per-request via the shared core fn (HOLDs free; async settle post-response)
paywall: x402 only (license.tier===x402); unpaid → 402; settles via CDP FacilitatorAdapter when X402_FACILITATOR=cdp
leak_guard: assertNoBazaarLeak (declaration) + tests/x402-http-routes.test.ts (no top-level live result on 402; no outcome_return_pct anywhere)
